tools.name: agent
tools.description: Launch a specialized subagent for one narrow, delegated task. By default, blocks until the agent completes and returns its result. Set waitForResult to false to run the agent in the background — you can continue working and the result will be available in the next turn. See the [Agents] section in the system prompt for available agent types.

description.description: Short 3-5 word description of what this agent will do

waitForResult.description: If true (default), block until the agent completes. If false, run in the background and return immediately.
